infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FarmAsyst North uses your camera to capture photos for farm activity logs, product listings, and AI-assisted flock/disease checks.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: FarmAsyst North accesses your photo library so you can attach photos to farm logs, marketplace listings, credit documents, and audit reports.

plugins.photosPermission: FarmAsyst North accesses your photo library so you can attach photos to farm logs, marketplace listings, and reports.
plugins.cameraPermission: FarmAsyst North uses your camera to capture photos for farm logs, listings, and AI-assisted checks.
